Seasonal inventory · capacity-constrained newsvendor · local RAG tutor

Capacity-Constrained Newsvendor Tutor

Use this tool to analyze a two-style parka production problem when Autumn and Leaves share one production capacity pool. The tutor is the main workspace. Open the full problem brief and supporting charts in separate live windows as needed.

Student analysis guide

How to proceed

Understand the setting.Start with the problem brief and product data.
Form a tentative recommendation.Use the controls to test quantity mixes that could be defended.
Compare the tradeoffs.Open charts to observe feasibility, profit, demand uncertainty, and marginal value.
Explain your logic.Ask the tutor to challenge or clarify your reasoning before printing the learning sheet.

RAG-based tutor

Ask about the lecture, symbols, intuition, or your current scenario

The tutor uses a local concept bank trained with generated student questions. It does not display internal retrieved chunks.

Welcome

Ask the tutor about symbols, newsvendor intuition, product availability, marginal contribution, capacity scarcity, or your current quantity mix.

The full problem is in a separate window so the main workspace stays focused on discussion and analysis.

Standalone local file. No external API, CDN, analytics, fetch, or XMLHttpRequest calls are used.
